requirement_topic.en: Maldives Island-Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz Settings, Anti-Islanding, and Utility Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 马尔代夫岛屿电网并网——230/400 V、50 Hz参数、防孤岛及公用事业审批
requirement_topic.zht: 馬爾地夫島嶼電網併網——230/400 V、50 Hz參數、防孤島及公用事業審批

summary.en: PV inverter deployments in the Maldives are typically reviewed at project level by the relevant utility: STELCO for Greater Male and several central service areas, and FENAKA for many outer atolls. Maldives projects commonly specify IEC-aligned grid-interface evidence, including IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility interface requirements, plus site-specific protection settings for local low-voltage island grids. The practical baseline is 230/400 V at 50 Hz. This is the same frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so inverter firmware, voltage windows, frequency windows, reconnection timing, and trip thresholds should be validated for the Maldives utility and project.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫光伏逆变器项目通常由相关公用事业单位进行项目级审查：大马累及部分中部服务区由STELCO负责，许多外环礁由FENAKA负责。马尔代夫项目通常要求符合IEC导向的并网接口证据，包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用事业接口要求，并针对本地低压岛屿电网设置项目特定保护参数。实际基准为230/400 V、50 Hz。该频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准，因此逆变器固件、电压窗口、频率窗口、重连时间和跳闸阈值应针对马尔代夫公用事业单位和项目进行验证。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫光伏逆變器項目通常由相關公用事業單位進行項目級審查：大馬累及部分中部服務區由STELCO負責，許多外環礁由FENAKA負責。馬爾地夫項目通常要求符合IEC導向的併網介面證據，包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用事業介面要求，並針對本地低壓島嶼電網設置項目特定保護參數。實際基準為230/400 V、50 Hz。該頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準，因此逆變器韌體、電壓窗口、頻率窗口、重連時間和跳閘閾值應針對馬爾地夫公用事業單位和項目進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Maldives utility project requirements — STELCO for Greater Male and FENAKA for many outer atolls
Maldives low-voltage supply practice — 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station interconnection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and domestic conformity practice. China uses 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156. Because the Maldives uses the same 50 Hz frequency but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage and island-grid protection philosophy, Chinese grid evidence should be treated as a baseline only, not as automatic STELCO or FENAKA acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件基于中国电网条件和国内合格评定实践。中国依据GB/T 156采用220/380 V、50 Hz。由于马尔代夫虽同为50 Hz频率，但采用不同的230/400 V标称电压和岛屿电网保护逻辑，中国并网证据只能作为基准，不应视为STELCO或FENAKA自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件基於中國電網條件和國內合格評定實踐。中國依據GB/T 156採用220/380 V、50 Hz。由於馬爾地夫雖同為50 Hz頻率，但採用不同的230/400 V標稱電壓和島嶼電網保護邏輯，中國併網證據只能作為基準，不應視為STELCO或FENAKA自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid certificates do not by themselves demonstrate that the inverter has been configured and tested for Maldives island-grid conditions. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, a settings sheet showing 230/400 V at 50 Hz protection parameters, reconnection and anti-islanding timing, and utility-specific documentation for STELCO or FENAKA review. Where settings differ from China-market factory defaults, document the firmware profile and retest material changes as required by the project engineer.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证书本身不能证明逆变器已针对马尔代夫岛屿电网条件完成配置和测试。出口商应准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、显示230/400 V 50 Hz保护参数的整定表、重连及防孤岛时间，以及供STELCO或FENAKA审查的公用事业特定文件。若设置不同于中国市场出厂默认值，应记录固件配置文件，并按项目工程师要求对重大变更重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證書本身不能證明逆變器已針對馬爾地夫島嶼電網條件完成配置和測試。出口商應準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、顯示230/400 V 50 Hz保護參數的整定表、重連及防孤島時間，以及供STELCO或FENAKA審查的公用事業特定文件。若設置不同於中國市場出廠預設值，應記錄韌體配置文件，並按項目工程師要求對重大變更重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected PV projects because STELCO, FENAKA, the project owner, or the appointed engineer must accept the grid-interface and protection settings before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid operator and domestic certification expectations but does not transfer automatically to Maldives utility acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence as a starting point only. Maldives uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage is 230/400 V rather than China's 220/380 V, and STELCO or FENAKA project approval will depend on Maldives-specific protection settings and IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据只能作为起点。马尔代夫与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压为230/400 V，而非中国220/380 V；STELCO或FENAKA项目批准将取决于马尔代夫特定保护设置以及IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據只能作為起點。馬爾地夫與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，而非中國220/380 V；STELCO或FENAKA項目批准將取決於馬爾地夫特定保護設置以及IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據。

requirement_topic.en: Utility and Project Governance — Maldives Energy Authority, STELCO, FENAKA, and Limited National Standards Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 公用事业及项目治理——马尔代夫能源署、STELCO、FENAKA及有限国家标准基础设施
requirement_topic.zht: 公用事業及項目治理——馬爾地夫能源署、STELCO、FENAKA及有限國家標準基礎設施

summary.en: Maldives solar and storage deployment is heavily project-driven. The Maldives Energy Authority and responsible ministry set electricity-sector policy and regulatory expectations, while STELCO and FENAKA control many practical utility approvals. The Maldives does not appear to have a strong dedicated national standards body for PV inverter product certification comparable to large-market NSBs, so tenders and donor-financed projects often rely on IEC references, utility requirements, and owner-engineer acceptance. China-BRI and donor-backed solar-plus-storage projects increase the need for clear documentary mapping between Chinese factory evidence and Maldives project specifications.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫太阳能和储能部署高度依赖项目。马尔代夫能源署及主管部委制定电力行业政策和监管预期，而STELCO和FENAKA掌握许多实际公用事业审批。马尔代夫似乎没有类似大型市场国家标准机构的强专门光伏逆变器产品认证机构，因此招标和援助融资项目通常依赖IEC引用、公用事业要求和业主工程师接受。中国一带一路及援助支持的光储项目增加了将中国工厂证据清晰映射至马尔代夫项目规格的必要性。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫太陽能和儲能部署高度依賴項目。馬爾地夫能源署及主管部委制定電力行業政策和監管預期，而STELCO和FENAKA掌握許多實際公用事業審批。馬爾地夫似乎沒有類似大型市場國家標準機構的強專門光伏逆變器產品認證機構，因此招標和援助融資項目通常依賴IEC引用、公用事業要求和業主工程師接受。中國一帶一路及援助支持的光儲項目增加了將中國工廠證據清晰映射至馬爾地夫項目規格的必要性。

standards_or_laws: Maldives Energy Authority electricity-sector regulatory role
STELCO utility requirements for Greater Male and related service areas
FENAKA utility requirements for many outer atoll systems
IEC standards commonly referenced in project specifications where no dedicated Maldives PV inverter product certification route is identified

summary.en: China has a mature domestic standards and certification ecosystem for PV inverters, including GB/T and NB/T standards, CNAS-accredited test laboratories, and voluntary CQC/CGC-style certification routes. That ecosystem can produce useful technical evidence, but it is not the same as Maldives project approval. Maldives utility or owner-engineer review may ask for IEC reports, English documentation, environmental derating information, and project-specific declarations beyond the Chinese certificates normally used for domestic sales.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的光伏逆变器国内标准和认证体系，包括GB/T和NB/T标准、CNAS认可实验室以及CQC/CGC等自愿认证路径。该体系可产生有用的技术证据，但并不等同于马尔代夫项目批准。马尔代夫公用事业单位或业主工程师审查可能要求IEC报告、英文文件、环境降额信息和项目特定声明，超出中国国内销售通常使用的证书范围。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的光伏逆變器國內標準和認證體系，包括GB/T和NB/T標準、CNAS認可實驗室以及CQC/CGC等自願認證路徑。該體系可產生有用的技術證據，但並不等同於馬爾地夫項目批准。馬爾地夫公用事業單位或業主工程師審查可能要求IEC報告、英文文件、環境降額資訊和項目特定聲明，超出中國國內銷售通常使用的證書範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited China test-laboratory reports and voluntary CQC/CGC-style certification evidence

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic certificate package is not a Maldives approval package. Exporters should create a Maldives project dossier that maps each Chinese report to the IEC or utility requirement requested by the tender, highlights any missing IEC evidence, identifies whether STELCO or FENAKA is the accepting utility, and states that no automatic acceptance by a dedicated Maldives PV inverter national certification body has been assumed.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内证书包并不是马尔代夫批准文件包。出口商应建立马尔代夫项目文件，将每份中国报告映射至招标要求的IEC或公用事业要求，标明缺失的IEC证据，确认接受公用事业单位为STELCO还是FENAKA，并说明未假定存在专门马尔代夫光伏逆变器国家认证机构的自动接受。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內證書包並不是馬爾地夫批准文件包。出口商應建立馬爾地夫項目文件，將每份中國報告映射至招標要求的IEC或公用事業要求，標明缺失的IEC證據，確認接受公用事業單位為STELCO還是FENAKA，並說明未假定存在專門馬爾地夫光伏逆變器國家認證機構的自動接受。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and mandatory where the tender, owner engineer, STELCO, FENAKA, or Maldives Energy Authority requires documentary acceptance before import, installation, commissioning, or energisation
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certificates are useful evidence but are not equivalent to Maldives utility or project-owner acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China certificate package is automatically accepted in the Maldives. Build a project dossier around the accepting utility, usually STELCO or FENAKA, and map Chinese reports to IEC and tender requirements. Flag openly that a strong dedicated Maldives PV inverter national standards-body route has not been identified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国证书包在马尔代夫自动被接受。应围绕接受公用事业单位（通常为STELCO或FENAKA）建立项目文件，并将中国报告映射至IEC和招标要求。应坦率标明尚未识别出强专门马尔代夫光伏逆变器国家标准机构路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國證書包在馬爾地夫自動被接受。應圍繞接受公用事業單位（通常為STELCO或FENAKA）建立項目文件，並將中國報告映射至IEC和招標要求。應坦率標明尚未識別出強專門馬爾地夫光伏逆變器國家標準機構路徑。
